raw.advertiser_name: 크랙 - 즉흥 서사 플레이, AI 채팅

hook.summary: A split-screen comparison of two attractive male leads asking the viewer to choose their favorite archetype.
hook.visual_action: Two anime-style male characters are displayed side-by-side with a choice prompt overlay.
hook.text_overlay: 메인 남주파 vs 서브병 말기환자, 당신은 어느쪽? 로판 악녀가 되다

scene_flow: Initial split-screen comparison of two male leads with a personality/role prompt.
Characters blink and change expressions while the background transitions to a fantasy setting.
The two characters are shown together in front of a fantasy castle background.
Final title card appears with a call to action asking the player to choose a target.
on_screen_text: 메인 남주파 vs 서브병 말기환자, 당신은 어느쪽?
흑발 황태자 남주 vs 금발 댕댕이 서브남
audience_proxy: Young women who enjoy romance fantasy webtoons and otome-style choice games.
